code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut first = true
    mut have = false
    mut sign = 1
    mut val = 0
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          if have
            let signed = sign * val
            let sq = signed * signed
            if first
              result = "#{sq}"
              first = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{sq}"
            end
            have = false
            sign = 1
            val = 0
          end
        else if b == 45
          sign = -1
          have = true
        else if b == 43
          have = true
        else
          val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
          have = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if have
      let signed = sign * val
      let sq = signed * signed
      if first
        result = "#{sq}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{sq}"
      end
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
